news.title: Gold holds below $4,000, silver below $60 — has the shimmer worn off the precious metal rally?
news.description: Gold is down almost 8% so far this year, while silver has shed more than 20%.

news.title: Autos and Healthcare lead Nifty past 24,200 as crude stays near $69
news.description: Automobile and healthcare stocks drove the rally, while energy and metals saw selling as crude oil prices neared $69–70 per barrel

news.title: A股三大指数集体收涨，全市场超4200股飘绿
news.description: 36氪获悉，A股三大指数集体收涨，沪指涨0.23%，深成指涨1.82%，创业板指涨2.84%；GPU、CPO大涨，德明利、长电科技涨停，佰维存储涨超15%，新易盛、兆易创新涨超9%；培育钻石概念走强，沃尔德、惠丰钻石涨超10%；贵金属、油气走弱，紫金矿业跌超6%，赤峰黄金、中国海油跌超5%；个股跌多涨少，全市场超4200股飘绿。

news.title: 主题圆桌：当所有人都看到泡沫，机器人何时走入真实场景 | 36氪WAVES2026新浪潮
